title: Senko Totem
description: This texture pack adds a totem in the form of Senko San from the anime Sewayaki Kitsune no Senko-san to the game. This texture pack also changes the sounds of the original totem, adding interest to its use without breaking the game's style.
body: This texture pack **adds a totem** in the form **of Senko San** from the anime Sewayaki Kitsune no Senko-san to the game. This texture pack also **changes the sounds of the original totem**, adding interest to its use without breaking the game's style.
